LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF DID NOT SATISFY ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION AS TO EITHER LIABILITY OR THE AMOUNT OWED BY DEFENDANT. THE DAVIS DECLARATION STATES THAT THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT AND THE ACCOUNT LEDGER ARE ATTACHED, BUT THEY ARE NOT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SONIA WONG, CSR #11288
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-23-2012 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert Adler, 415-695-2867, Defendant and opposing party in Pro Per

No other appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Denied. Plaintiff did not satisfy its burden of production as to either liability or the amount owed by defendant. The Davis declaration states that the parties' agreement and the account ledger are attached, but they are not. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-11-510636 WITH CASE CGC-11-510514

DEFENDANT ROBERT ADLER MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-11-510636 WITH CASE CGC-11-510514 is Denied. The court did not receive courtesy copies of the moving papers as required by San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 B. Judge: Marla Miller, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/MM
